column1: # Chapter plan for cut_chapters.py — one line per chapter:  <start><TAB>Title
#   start: seconds (1373.0) or MM:SS / H:MM:SS. Use the scene-opening line's
#          timestamp straight from the SRT — it is an ANCHOR, not a precise cut:
#          cut_chapters.py snaps it into the adjacent pause, so slightly early is fine.
#   First chapter starts at 0; each chapter ends where the next begins; last runs to EOF.
#   Blank lines and #-comments are ignored. Fields are TAB-separated.
#   Titles are content-based (scene or song name, e.g. "Be Our Guest"), never "Chapter 1".
# Delete these comments or keep them; either way, replace the rows below.
